first_impression_why: A has a confident, minimalist research-lab aesthetic that signals deep technical credibility through restraint rather than marketing polish.
reasoning: A wins on design confidence — the minimalism feels intentional and research-oriented rather than incomplete, projecting 'we don't need to sell you, the work speaks for itself.' B is actually more informative and has better visible traction metrics, but A's restraint paradoxically signals more gravitas. This is a close call — A's approach only works if you already have brand recognition or massive funding behind you.
